name: A&M Pawn and Gold Buyers
description_short: Orlando-based pawn shop specializing in gold buying, selling, and trading for over 30 years. Uses certified scales and offers free appraisals from experienced staff.
description_long:
A&M Pawn and Gold Buyers has operated in the heart of Orlando, Florida for over 30 years, establishing itself as a trusted local pawn shop with deep community roots. The business has successfully adapted to modern commerce while maintaining traditional pawn shop operations, building strong relationships with customers, employees, and partner companies throughout its tenure.

The company's primary focus is buying, selling, and trading gold in any karat and condition. They use scales certified by the Department of Agriculture and Consumer Affairs to ensure accurate weighing and fair pricing on gold transactions. The business offers free appraisals from experienced employees for customers uncertain about item values. Beyond gold, the site indicates they buy and sell other items typical to pawn shop operations, though specific non-gold inventory is not detailed on their website.

A&M Pawn distinguishes itself through certified measurement equipment, which they emphasize as enabling competitive pricing. Their 30-year tenure in Orlando suggests consistency and local reputation. They maintain an active social media presence on Facebook (523 followers) and eBay, and actively promote customer engagement through a 10% discount offer for Facebook likes, indicating basic digital marketing efforts.

The company operates limited hours (Monday-Friday 10 AM-6 PM, Saturday 10 AM-3 PM, closed Sundays) from a single location on S Orange Blossom Trail. As a traditional pawn shop rather than a specialized gold buyer, customers should expect standard pawn shop lending terms and collateral-based loans in addition to buying/selling services. The website provides minimal detail about loan terms, interest rates, or specific lending products available.
address: 118 S Orange Blossom Trl, Orlando, FL 32805

company_info.headquarters: 118 S Orange Blossom Trl, Orlando, FL 32805

pros: Department of Agriculture and Consumer Affairs certified scales for accurate gold weighing and fair pricing
Over 30 years of continuous operation in Orlando demonstrates stability and local reputation
Free appraisals from experienced employees for customers unsure of item value
Buys gold in any karat and any condition, offering flexibility to customers with varied inventory
Active social media presence (Facebook, eBay) with customer engagement promotions (10% Facebook discount)
Long-established relationships with customers and local businesses
Convenient single location in central Orlando with consistent operating hours
cons: Website lacks detail on loan terms, interest rates, repayment periods, or lending product specifics
Limited operating hours (closed Sundays, closes at 6 PM weekdays) may not suit all customer schedules
Single location only—no multiple branches or online transaction options despite having a website
Website provides minimal information about non-gold items they buy/sell or trade options
No online appraisal or inquiry system; requires phone call or in-person visit for estimates
best_for: Orlando-area residents needing quick cash through collateral-based loans against gold or jewelry
Gold sellers seeking fair market value from a business using certified measurement equipment
Customers wanting in-person appraisals and transactions with an established local business
Repeat customers who value 30+ year local reputation and community relationships
diagnosis: A&M Pawn and Gold Buyers is best for Orlando residents who want to sell or pawn gold items with confidence in fair pricing through certified scales, or who need a collateral-based loan from an established local business. The main caveat is that the website provides almost no information about lending terms, rates, or conditions—customers must call or visit in person to understand pawn loan specifics.
services: Gold buying in any karat and any condition
Trade-in services for gold and other items
Certified scale weighing (Department of Agriculture and Consumer Affairs certified)
Pawn loans using items as collateral
Facebook social media engagement and promotions
